message:
feat(connectors): Improve parsing robustness and add fixture test support

Updates across connector modules for better error handling and test coverage:

src/connectors/claude_code.rs:
- Enhanced JSONL parsing with better error recovery
- Improved tool result extraction from nested payloads
- Added support for new response_item formats
- Better timestamp parsing with fallback handling

src/connectors/codex.rs:
- Improved event_msg and response_item handling
- Enhanced role detection for multi-turn conversations
- Added support for rollout format variations
- Better handling of malformed session files

src/connectors/cursor.rs:
- Improved SQLite state.vscdb parsing
- Better handling of composer vs chat sessions
- Enhanced workspace path extraction

src/connectors/aider.rs:
- Minor parsing improvements
- Better input/output block detection

These changes support the no-mock testing initiative (T6.4) by ensuring
connectors correctly parse the fixture files in tests/fixtures/connectors/
rather than relying on mock data structures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
